description: This clutch from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Dimensions : 11 cm x 28.5 cmWoven silk upper in blue with a braid detail on the flap for styleFlap with double magnetic button closureFabric inner with two main compartmentsPouch inside for mobile pouchCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
